content: any suggestions for a new team?

I'm going to ask for help too - I'm sure y'all get this a hundred times a day. Cheri's guide is great and the Flares guides are good, but I feel like I'm struggling to find damage as I'm missing a primary DPS still. I pulled tawil, but without relics for her she's just diddling mostly while I try to counter/shield. If I don't run Sanga I can't really sustain fights either.

Any suggestions on where to invest to finish arc1 ch5+ while I work on account level and pulling together actual teams? 

Here's what I've been trying in train to get an idea of comp:
Tawil+Cae+Naut core (Missing some survivability in dupes is really hurting)
+
Sanga (Survived fine.. for 700 turns)
Ramona (Plenty of energy to ult spam.. and do nothing with it all)

I haven't tried tawil+cae+naut+24 - I was using her with cae, goliath, tulu to speedrun 1shot story up till now.. Maybe it would work?
Is celestial beast best in slot for Gelot after sword is +12?
for non limited wheels, yes
Whats the limited one?
sig
Should I use a Prototype Horizon here and if so on who?
Have you considered pulling arachne
Also flares guides have estimated 60% good info and 40% misinfo. Would not reccomend
E.g. clem, pollux, Mouchette are good
Arachne can be paired well witj caecus celeste +1
I rather play thais lotan than tawil main dps
Finally manged to beat the phase 4 boss in rail with this team, still need a lot of train upgrades
probably not the best team makeup but a fun build

Yea I'm learning it's not perfect info. 

No i haven't considered since i was following the guide I've been dumping on moon
Oh, get arachne as your top priority. Moonless is good for new players but arachne is a very good boost to your acc
Id run her what tawil, Winkle, alva?
Alva might not work well there, the rest is fine
But arachne is a very complicated unit to play
For the early game, you can just focus on using her 1 cost to clear mobs

Hi guys, I’m new to the game and have been playing for about 3–4 days. I’ve tried to build my teams by reading the skills as best as I could, and because I don’t want to waste my silver/cores, I wanted to ask if there’s anyone in my current teams or character pool that you would change or prioritize that I don’t already have.
Also, if you have any advice regarding WoD/weapons, I’d really appreciate it. 😃
jus try stuff out for levels, lv 60 is cheap and easy to get after 1-2 months of playing dont worry too much abt mats
for pulls, arachne dupes until e3 are good
but if u dont plan to rush story for pulls u can just save
Okay, I’m gonna grind. I really like her—she’s so fun to play with. If I don’t hit E3, how long do I have to wait for her to come back?
A long time
btw thank you for answer
Dont count on the rerun
Might be a year from now
jzz
thanks for warning 😮
That doesn’t mean you should dump your pulls for arachne though
can someone please help me form five teams to upgrade and build for the next d zone?
ive tried looking up team building guides but most of them include new characters and i just started playing a few weeks ago <:Caecus_alone:1486654030003437598>
Strange enough I also got the same request. I tried to do GHelot, Vortice, Kath, Arachne, one for each wave. But can't seem to break thru w2d3.
use a whale support for w2
Already used it for W5
w2 is hardest this dtide
arachne can solo w3 since it's ultra ring
I see, Ok guess it is reset time for all my guys.

Ghelot and Wanda/arachne are the only two meta teams you can build. Borrow a mouch for another team. You could make poison teams with Liz and or Nymph but they won't be good without a lot of investment
Otherwise just throw together some scuffed team temporarily around jenkin and sorel
awww what a shame
thank you for the advice!
Lol Arachne really soloed W3
Are you talking about W3 Alert 5?
How much should i build arachne out for that?
a4, a5 I kinda got trampled.
But my team was Arachne, Cass. and two randos
I see. I haven’t really done dtide yet and ive been playing around 4 months now maybe more
So i know I’ve been missing out on resources
But it’s a bit overwhelming and time consuming to make 5 different teams
And im stuck af lol
Absolutely not optimal
use erica posse
incredibly unserious unit
need good sf and exalt lv
lv60 is ok
the better your supports are the less u need for sf and exalt lv
What’s sf?
if u bring 3 bums u prolly want sf10 and exalt lv6 for comfy clear
soulforge
Who should i upgrade for dtide<:VertinHmm:1346449883997016167>
Caecus Wanda Tinct
Can skimp on Tinct levels some for now though since shes mostly used for crit buffs
<a:VoyaNod:1388081248735330306> thank you
Wanda is kind of situational but she can carry if you bring her to the right stage
Shes very good into current wave 4
Suits me
Any crumbs is good<:SpathodeaWisdom:1177162591408230470>

Could i get some assistance with teams?

Currently im planning 

Mouch Aigis Helot Thais

Castor Horla Jenkins + someone else idk

Miriam Celeste Tulu  + assisting GMurphy

An arachne team if i can think of one

And idk
For dtide* and not necessarily in that order
Should i keep using salvador thais aigis horla or should i start investing in other characters?
Got a bunch of upgrading material but dont want to invest more in salvador if other characters diff him later in story
Well up to lvl 60 is relatively low investment
So don’t worry about that
If you can level up your arachne and her skills, using ephemeral eternity and dreams of medicine covenant she can solo w3
alert 5
I can do that. Ive got plenty of resources stacked up
For lemurian team would recommend you go Miriam, tulu, goliath, assist gmurphy. Goliath exalt buff is a big part of that teams damage.
how leveled is your vortice skills
shell card is leveled
and have sf
she should be a carry for a wave
And her soulforge is 10:10

your main team is up to you.

But if you love Salvador - you should start Salv /Arachne / Thais + 1 more
dump her with celeste murphy and caecus or something
do w 4
Do i level them?
every char should lvl 60
every one
Ah okay
u can go full lemurian for your borrow gmurphy i guess with goli tulu and miryam
Which wave should the borrow go to? 5?
And do i need to put SF points on everyone? And uh whats a good low investment stopping point for the soulforge
For arachne how much SF should i put?
as much as possible otherwise she doesnt do enough damage. lvl 5 is the minimum bar in my mind
for every unit lol
lvl 5 is the cheap baseline, lvl 8 is the next milestone
lvl 10 is expensive af
Ohkay damn lvl 5 seems like a lot but yeah its about time i start clearing dtide
Cause ive been postponing doing this
Who do i put with her? Or it doesn’t matter at all?
Just do a1 at least, any level 60s can do it
doesnt matter but weakness/draw/shield support is nice
Guys new to the game! What should I invest into which will transition okay into late game stuff
crypto
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:

## General Guide

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University

- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

## Mode Specific

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Standards, Caecus, Goliath(support), Nymph

 Faint, Karen (they are evergreen but no need to overinvest in them)
Any Sorel Enjoyers here?
I kinda choked my 4 pick banner
and now im here
i looove sorel
so I kinda wanna know how to use her
essentially ur embryo fusion maxxing
so who do u sub out
she has her infinite devour mechanic where she does giga damage the more embryos she eats
is it better to do sorel thais aigis + leigh
oh yeah that’s my comp lol
i looked at the guide but I dont have pickman
sorel does some moderate healing depending on if you’ve played her 2 cost i think?
i was wondering if its possible to just use horla but she doesnt seem to have much synergy with her
i have arachne there instead of leigh but leigh is great for more str and sustain bc sorel does enjoy not having health
i think a warden would be better tho, for massive shields rather than healing
hmm i’m not sure
my only wardens are wanda and lily
maybe u want someone that doesn’t take up that much hand space bc i often find that like 70% of my hand is embryos by the time i get to sorel burst turn
lily works
did u pull arachne at all?
she’s quite good
so lily + thais sorla
i guess aigis is better for vunerable
since horla isnt there anymore
yeah aigis is pretty good
what WoD does sorla use?
is it also titan?
for example u can do stuff like this w sorel lol
by rose alone (her sig) and titan yeah
anything with crit dmg/crit rate
that healing is fully from sorel too btw. she has a mechanic where she heals more with every hit she does, so that’s why u really want to have a stacked hand full of embryos
ok
im kinda new to all the mechanics still but I guess ill just play with it more
and see how it goes
yeah ofc
if u have any questions feel free to ping me
the guide said she works best with blue cause of the tentacle effects
oh really
but I really dont have any good blues
idk if blue team has any impact on sorel’s output tho
just ultra and lily for chaos
i have her with arachne
u should definitely pull arachne if you haven’t already btw. she’s viable at e0
it does
blue sorel is rly good
i will need to try that then
red stance does a tent hit for each of her exalt hits
does her banner work the same way as other banners?
so it adds up a lot
90 pull for full pity
yes
oh whaaat
imma need to try that then
would like goli work then? or someone with cheaper cards? i have corpo
i did arachne trial
and im just confused
okay
so basically all you want to do is stack up weaver stacks
every time you play her one cost eternal loom, that does the purple thing on the enemies health bar, it creates another 0 cost card
you want to use that up to 5 times
id run celeste or gmurphy
you can exalt arachne AFTER you annihilate (click the vortex thing next to the purple ultra bar) or after you enter ultra round
and you want to use cards from other awakeners to use up those weaver stacks (from the 0 cost) which will trigger arachne’s pursuit and deal more final verdict (the purple covering up the health bar)
look max damage lmao
okay i see
gawdamn
(my own sorel sucks so this is borrowed)
whats that 2nd wod on thais
this timing is super important otherwise arachne wont do anything
paid event christmas wheel
you can tell bc part of her exalt description will be greyed out
yeah I was also confused how horla worked
ultra is really weird xD
if you see an ultra character’s cards highlighted in yellow, that means they have an additional effect that is triggered upon being the first card to be played
you can see that in the card’s description under “leap”

horla has 4 emotions

anger - more damage
grief - more shielding
joy - more aliemus
fear - more str/poison/counter
you can ignore fear it sucks
yeah understoon the leap but it took me a day
you swap in to her emotions but playing her cards when they glow yellow
cause she had a rouse that was hard to understand
on how it stacked
and then they stack as a passive buff until you swap to a different one
her exalt amplifies whichever emotion you are jn
I thought her current stance was the one that got a effect
yeah
xD took me a day to realize that
basically you wanna be in anger for most comps
grief for stall/heavy shielding
and joy is situational
i was on dirge a lot
yeah ur valid morimens is the most reading heavy game ive seen in a while
then only did snarl
when i burst and exalted
team seems to have like some perma STR stacking
kinda love that about the game
but its so confusing at the start
dirge is the 2 cost right? str up and str down?
i couldnt beat the level 3 event stage until i understood the boss mech and how she worked
yeah
it also boosted how much str u get
thats the worst one lmao
thats the one you should usually delete
i don’t use horla so idk that much, my main ultra team uses clem instead
i normaly copied it a lot
with thais
so I could get space to burst xd
not worth i think
felt like i died so many times without doing it
id recommend deleting dirge in a shop
gives 50 sigils too
u just rely on weakness?
horla and clem both have their upsides but horla confuses me a lot more lol
yes
i guess im just to low level for the event stage
just borrow someones like level 70 mouchette
i can give you the UID of a giga whale mouch
if you so desire
its fine
maybe when im done with the story
made it a thing to get a day 1 exeprience or as close to it
gotcha no worries
story seems to be easy
just the event was kinda surpised me on how much damage the stages did
just make sure to clear the event fully before its done its rly good rewards
u mean the box reset thing?
im on the last box now
that one yes, and theres another one live rn
getting all the achievements etc
it gives me a warning when i enter
yeah thats normal
is this just a spoiler warning?
for events when youre newer you grab a whale support and let them destroy it for you
yes
cause i dont get the same message when i click the yellow button
its for side stories
but you can always unlock it for now and skip story then read later
bcs after the event the unlock costs reality verges
you get like one of them a day so best to just unlock
indeed
and the free posse also strengthens your account (a tiny bit)

and do it
anyways i can buy a specific one in this one
instead of rolling for rewards

i didnt even notice

rewinding time is the priority

over the purple slots

you can equip two when one of them is maxxed out

you will eventually max out the shop wheels
more long term progression
